summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: x_n=(1+1/n)^n Cauchy sequence in ℚ converging to e. Axes x∈[2, 3]; dashed RED e reference. ValueTracker n_tr sweeps 1→200 with always_redraw YELLOW cumulative dots + ORANGE current + GREEN shrinking ε-ball around x_n with half-width |x_{n+1}-x_n|. Live x_n, |x_{n+1}-x_n|, |x_n - e|; all ⊂ℚ but limit ∉ ℚ.
